hypothesis: A coordinated heterogeneous ensemble of at least eight LLM agents initialized with diverse sampling temperatures and independent exploration priors, managed by a central summarizer that reallocates a fixed total experimental time budget to under-explored reactor regions, will discover more than 30% additional ground-truth ALP reaction mechanisms (ALD, ALE, ASD, and CVD variants) and increase correct mechanistic labeling accuracy by over 20 percentage points compared to a single high-capacity LLM agent given the same total experimental budget.
